headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Everest Group, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Everest Group (NYSE:EG) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $355 to $360.
